memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection in the Brain architecture.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent in the Brain architecture.
It is an open question whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is an open question which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Committed architecture principle: Brain DB as source of truth.
Committed architecture principle: Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed architecture principle: Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Committed open question: whether Telegram should be added later.
Committed open question: cheapest model while saturating performance.
